```{r}
#| label: setup-ritem
#| include: false
#| cache: false

renv::load("~/Github/longhaiSK.github.io/")

ritem <- function(n = NULL) {
  # 1. Initialize environment on the very first call per knit session
  if (!exists(".ritem_env", envir = globalenv())) {
    env <- new.env()
    env$list_idx <- 0
    env$item_idx <- 0
    
    # Use the current file name for the aux file to prevent cross-file conflicts
    input_name <- knitr::current_input()
    if (is.null(input_name)) input_name <- "default"
    env$aux_file <- paste0(".", tools::file_path_sans_ext(input_name), "_ritem.rds")
    
    # Load previous totals from the last knit if they exist
    if (file.exists(env$aux_file)) {
      env$prev_totals <- readRDS(env$aux_file)
    } else {
      env$prev_totals <- numeric(0)
    }
    env$curr_totals <- numeric(0)
    
    assign(".ritem_env", env, envir = globalenv())
  }
  
  env <- get(".ritem_env", envir = globalenv())
  
  # 2. Handle 'new' initialization signal
  if (identical(n, "new")) {
    env$list_idx <- env$list_idx + 1
    env$item_idx <- 0
    # Expand current totals vector for the new list
    if (length(env$curr_totals) < env$list_idx) {
      env$curr_totals[env$list_idx] <- 0
    }
    # Return an empty string so the `r ritem("new")` call leaves no trace
    return(knitr::asis_output(""))
  }
  
  # 3. Handle backwards compatibility if a manual number is passed (e.g., ritem(3))
  if (is.numeric(n)) {
    env$list_idx <- env$list_idx + 1
    env$item_idx <- 0
    env$prev_totals[env$list_idx] <- n 
  }
  
  # 4. Failsafe if user forgets 'new' for the very first list
  if (env$list_idx == 0) {
    env$list_idx <- 1
    env$item_idx <- 0
  }
  
  # 5. Increment item counter and save progress to the aux file
  env$item_idx <- env$item_idx + 1
  env$curr_totals[env$list_idx] <- env$item_idx
  
  # Overwriting on every call guarantees the final count is saved 
  # by the end of the document without needing complex chunk hooks.
  saveRDS(env$curr_totals, env$aux_file)
  
  # 6. Determine the reversed number to display
  total <- if (length(env$prev_totals) >= env$list_idx && !is.na(env$prev_totals[env$list_idx])) {
    env$prev_totals[env$list_idx]
  } else {
    # Fallback for the very first knit: prints '1' for everything so formatting doesn't break
    env$item_idx
  }
  
  num <- total - env$item_idx + 1
  
  # 7. Output Formatting
  out_format <- knitr::opts_knit$get("rmarkdown.pandoc.to")
  
  if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {
    out <- sprintf("\n\n\\hangindent=2.5em \\hangafter=1 \\makebox[2.5em][l]{%d.}", num)
    return(knitr::asis_output(out))
  } else if (knitr::is_html_output()) {
    out <- sprintf("\n\n<span class='ritem-num'>[%d]</span>", num)
    return(knitr::asis_output(out))
  } else if (!is.null(out_format) && out_format == "typst") {
    out <- sprintf("\n\n`%d. `{=typst}", num)
    return(knitr::asis_output(out))
  } else {
    return(paste0("\n\n[", num, "]"))
  }
}

```
